content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Remote Talent Cloud: Remote AI Training - $20/hr - United States Anywhere in the World California All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/1817/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Cheyenne, WY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://remotetalentcloud.com/">https://remotetalentcloud.com/</a> </p> <p class="is-style-text-subtitle is-style-text-subtitle--6">==========</p> <p class="is-style-text-subtitle is-style-text-subtitle--6"><strong>IMPORTANT! </strong>Please use this link to apply:<br><strong>вһҰпёЏ</strong>&nbsp;<a href="https://remotetalentcloud.com/apply-ai/">https://remotetalentcloud.com/apply-ai/</a></p> <p class="is-style-text-subtitle is-style-text-subtitle--6">==========</p> <p><strong>Description:</strong></p> <p class="wp-block-paragraph">As an <a href="https://remotetalentcloud.com/apply-ai/">AI Training Specialist</a> (Data Annotation), youвЂ™ll play a key role in helping train and improve artificial intelligence (AI) systems. Your work will directly support how AI models learn to recognize text, images, and other data accurately.</p> <p class="wp-block-paragraph">Your main responsibilities will include:</p> <ul class="wp-block-list"> <li>Labeling and categorizing data (such as text, images, or short videos) according to detailed project guidelines</li> <li>Reviewing and verifying data for accuracy, consistency, and completeness</li> <li>Identifying and flagging any errors, inconsistencies, or unclear data</li> <li>Following clear annotation instructions to ensure high-quality results</li> <li>Meeting productivity and accuracy goals within project timelines</li> <li>Maintaining confidentiality and adhering to all data security standards</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p> <p class="wp-block-paragraph">WeвЂ™re looking for detail-oriented individuals who are comfortable working independently and enjoy structured, accuracy-focused tasks. The ideal candidate will have:</p> <ul class="wp-block-list"> <li>This is a fully remote position, but you must be located within the United States</li> <li>Excellent attention to detail and strong organizational skills</li> <li>A reliable Internet connection and computer</li> <li>The ability to focus for extended periods and follow detailed written instructions</li> <li>Strong written communication skills in English</li> <li>Previous data annotation, labeling, or transcription experience is a plus, but not required</li> </ul> <p><strong>Why Apply:</strong></p> <ul class="wp-block-list"> <li>Fully remote: work from anywhere within the United States</li> <li>Full-time and part-time available</li> <li>Competitive <a href="https://remotetalentcloud.com/apply-ai/">hourly pay from $20/hr</a></li> <li>Training provided for all annotation tools and workflows</li> <li>Gain hands-on experience supporting real-world AI training projects</li> <li>Be part of a growing remote team working on cutting-edge technology</li> </ul> <p><strong>How to Apply:</strong></p> <p>Please use this link to apply: <a href="https://remotetalentcloud.com/apply-ai/">https://remotetalentcloud.com/apply-ai/</a></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/remote-talent-cloud-remote-ai-training-20-hr-united-states-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/remote-talent-cloud-remote-ai-training-20-hr-united-states-1</a></p>
